title: Public explorer (no accounts/PII; shows source + evidence level + "not advice")
context: A lightweight public explorer makes the graph usable by non-programmers while surfacing source, evidence level, and the not-advice label, and collecting no PII. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Build a static, no-account public explorer to browse a Fusion/Gene/Pathway and its assertions, each shown with source, evidence level, and the 'not medical advice' label, linking to raw exports.
acceptanceCriteria: Browse a Fusion/Gene/Pathway and see its assertions, each with source, evidence level, and the 'not medical advice' label.
Static / no-account; collects no visitor PII; links to raw KGX/JSON-LD/Turtle exports.
output: A static public explorer (code + build) surfacing source/evidence/not-advice, committed via PR.
